task: Static enterprise Methodology navigation and information architecture polish

removed: reduced-motion listener used only for animation
animation_removal_summary.result: The Methodology navigation rail is now static. It no longer moves automatically and has no hover-driven animation behavior.

methodology_organization_changes.section_label_polish: Renamed similar labels into a clearer learning flow where each tab answers one obvious question.

cfs_at_a_glance_changes.purpose: Make the Methodology opening section easier for a higher-up or demo viewer to understand in under a minute.

capability_improvements.notes: Capability cards now describe actual user-facing workflows, where to see them, and the caveat for each.

model_section_improvements.safety: The section continues to show aggregate model governance only and does not show parcel-level prediction scores or parcel-level ranking classes.

priority_1: WSACC true utility capacity / service readiness
countywide future land use / small-area plan GIS
data_needed_improvements.format_guidance: REST/GIS/table preferred. PDF-only is useful for reference but weaker for automated CFS integration.

safety_verification.notes: The string prediction_probability_available=false remains only as an aggregate model safety flag, which is allowed by the task. No parcel-level probability or ranking class appears in Methodology.

validation_results.npm_run_dev: attempted; refused to start a duplicate server because CFS already owned localhost:3000 with next dev -p 3000
validation_results.backend_validation: not run; backend files were not changed

remaining_known_issues: The existing top mode labels render compact duplicate accessible text in the small viewport, but this task did not modify the app-wide top navigation.
The Methodology aggregate model section still includes allowed safety-flag wording, not parcel-level model output.
